title: PostgreSQL Streaming & Logical Decoding

key_classes.name: PostgresStreamingChangeEventSource
methods: PostgresStreamingChangeEventSource(PostgresConnectorConfig, SnapshotterService, PostgresConnection, PostgresEventDispatcher, ErrorHandler, Clock, PostgresSchema, PostgresTaskContext, ReplicationConnection)
void execute(ChangeEventSourceContext, PostgresPartition, PostgresOffsetContext) throws InterruptedException
private void processMessages(ChangeEventSourceContext, PostgresPartition, PostgresOffsetContext, ReplicationStream) throws SQLException, InterruptedException
private void processReplicationMessages(PostgresPartition, PostgresOffsetContext, ReplicationStream, ReplicationMessage) throws SQLException, InterruptedException
private void searchWalPosition(ChangeEventSourceContext, PostgresPartition, PostgresOffsetContext, ReplicationStream, WalPositionLocator) throws SQLException, InterruptedException
private void commitMessage(PostgresPartition, PostgresOffsetContext, Lsn) throws SQLException, InterruptedException

key_classes.name: ReplicationStream
inner_interfaces: ReplicationMessageProcessor (FunctionalInterface: void process(ReplicationMessage) throws SQLException, InterruptedException)

key_classes.name: ReplicationMessage
inner_types: enum Operation { INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, TRUNCATE, MESSAGE, BEGIN, COMMIT, NOOP(deprecated), ORIGIN }

interface Column { String getName(); PostgresType getType(); ColumnTypeMetadata getTypeMetadata(); Object getValue(PgConnectionSupplier, boolean); boolean isOptional(); default boolean isToastedColumn(); }
interface ColumnTypeMetadata { int getLength(); int getScale(); }

interface ColumnValue<T> { T getRawValue(); boolean isNull(); String asString(); Boolean asBoolean(); Integer asInteger(); Long asLong(); Float asFloat(); Double asDouble(); Object asDecimal(); LocalDate asLocalDate(); OffsetDateTime asOffsetDateTimeAtUtc(); ... + geo types + array/default }
class NoopMessage implements ReplicationMessage { isSkippedMessage()=true; getTable() throws UnsupportedOperationException }

key_classes.name: MessageDecoder
methods: void processMessage(ByteBuffer, ReplicationMessageProcessor, TypeRegistry) throws SQLException, InterruptedException

key_classes.name: AbstractMessageDecoder
methods: void processMessage(ByteBuffer, ReplicationMessageProcessor, TypeRegistry) — handles null buffer, delegates to processNotEmptyMessage
abstract void processNotEmptyMessage(ByteBuffer, ReplicationMessageProcessor, TypeRegistry) throws SQLException, InterruptedException
boolean shouldMessageBeSkipped(ByteBuffer, Lsn, Lsn, WalPositionLocator) — delegates to walPosition.skipMessage()

key_classes.name: PgOutputMessageDecoder
methods: boolean shouldMessageBeSkipped(ByteBuffer, Lsn, Lsn, WalPositionLocator) — peeks first byte for MessageType; always reprocesses BEGIN/COMMIT/RELATION/ORIGIN
void processNotEmptyMessage(ByteBuffer, ReplicationMessageProcessor, TypeRegistry) — dispatches on MessageType char
ChainedLogicalStreamBuilder defaultOptions(...) — sets proto_version=1, publication_names, messages=true (PG14+)
key_classes.inner_enum: MessageType { RELATION('R'), BEGIN('B'), COMMIT('C'), INSERT('I'), UPDATE('U'), DELETE('D'), TYPE('Y'), ORIGIN('O'), TRUNCATE('T'), LOGICAL_DECODING_MESSAGE('M') }

key_classes.name: PgProtoMessageDecoder
key_classes.notes: Deserializes protobuf messages from postgres-decoderbufs plugin. Supports INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/BEGIN/COMMIT ops.
methods: void processNotEmptyMessage(ByteBuffer, ReplicationMessageProcessor, TypeRegistry) — uses PgProto protobuf parser

key_classes.name: PgOutputReplicationMessage
methods: PgOutputReplicationMessage(Operation, String, Instant, Long, List<Column>, List<Column>)

key_classes.name: ReplicationConnection
methods: ReplicationStream startStreaming(Lsn, WalPositionLocator) throws SQLException, InterruptedException
inner_types: interface Builder { withSlot, withPublication, withTableFilter, withPublicationAutocreateMode, withPlugin, dropSlotOnClose, createFailOverSlot, statusUpdateInterval, withTypeRegistry, withSchema, streamParams, jdbcMetadataConnection, build() }

key_classes.name: PostgresReplicationConnection
key_classes.notes: Creates ReplicationStream via startStreaming(). Manages PGReplicationStream from PG JDBC driver.

key_classes.name: Lsn
key_classes.notes: WAL Log Sequence Number value object. Comparable. valueOf(Long), compareTo(Lsn).

key_relationships: PostgresStreamingChangeEventSource depends_on ReplicationConnection (uses startStreaming, reconnect, close)
ReplicationStream uses ReplicationMessageProcessor (inner functional interface) in read/readPending
PostgresReplicationConnection creates ReplicationStream (wraps PGReplicationStream from PG JDBC driver)
PostgresReplicationConnection uses MessageDecoder (PgOutputMessageDecoder or PgProtoMessageDecoder) to decode WAL bytes
PgOutputMessageDecoder.MessageType enum used to dispatch WAL byte stream
key_flows: execute(): searchWalPosition() if recovering -> finds resume LSN, reconnects, restarts stream

processReplicationMessages(): routes on message.getOperation() -> BEGIN/COMMIT (offsetContext.updateWalPosition + dispatcher.dispatchTransactionStarted/Committed), MESSAGE (dispatchLogicalDecodingMessage), ORIGIN (offsetContext.updateOrigin), DML (dispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent with PostgresChangeRecordEmitter)
commitOffset(): async lsnFlushExecutor.submit(() -> replicationStream.flushLsn(lsn)), timeout handled by lsnFlushTimeoutAction (FAIL/WARN/IGNORE)

PostgresReplicationConnection.startStreaming(): applies MessageDecoder.defaultOptions() to build PGReplicationStream, returns ReplicationStream impl that calls MessageDecoder.processMessage on each WAL buffer
important_notes: No Wal2JsonMessageDecoder class exists in this codebase. The two concrete decoders are PgOutputMessageDecoder (pgoutput, binary protocol) and PgProtoMessageDecoder (decoderbufs/protobuf).
PgOutputMessageDecoder is the modern/standard decoder using PostgreSQL's built-in pgoutput plugin.
WalPositionLocator handles LSN ordering complexity: parallel tx commits may arrive out-of-WAL order.
lsnFlushingAllowed flag prevents premature LSN flush on connector restart before any message is processed.
Keep-alive thread (startKeepAlive) prevents replication slot timeout during metadata queries.
Pre-snapshot catch-up streaming: holds transaction open to provide consistent snapshot start point.
ReplicationMessage.NoopMessage is a synthetic skipped-message placeholder to allow LSN advancement without emitting events.
PgOutputMessageDecoder always reprocesses BEGIN/COMMIT/RELATION/ORIGIN even during WAL position searching phase.
